items.title: Ukraine’s Minister of Defense, a Proponent of Drone Warfare, Is Forced Out
items.summary: Mykhailo Fedorov announced he was leaving the ministry on Wednesday after conflicts with generals and military contractors over the role of innovative weaponry.

items.title: Congress appeals to Wangchuk to end fast, says ‘his concerns are ours and that of other Oppn. parties’
items.summary: K.C. Venugopal, in a post on X, assured that the party will continue to “confront the Modi government and demand the Education Minister’s resignation”
